rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ROBERT KENTON KISTLER
rulings.Calendar Matter: PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 7/11/23. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) Still no proposed order has been received by the assigned examiner. [LRSF 14.7 A. and 14.59 E.] (2) No courtesy copy of the supplement filed on 4/28/23 (the deadline for providing a courtesy copy) has been received by the examiner as of 5/3/23. [LRSF 2.7 B. and 14.7 B.] (Courtesy copies are file stamped, single-sided, hard copies. Unfiled papers will not be reviewed.) (3) Notice must include the instructions regarding remote appearance procedures. [LRSF 14.1 D.6.] (4) Lucas Stapley is alleged in the petition to be 17 years old, but the service list shows that he is an adult. Did he turn 18 after 11/21/22? If he is still a minor, the person having legal custody of the minor with whom he resides must be identified and must receive separate notice. [CRC 7.51(d).] (5) Why is the 2017 KTM Duke 390 motorcycle being distributed to Naoki Matsumoto? That was not in the will. Aside from the specifically devised assets in the will, all remaining assets are to go either 20% or 10% to six individuals. (6) The decedent died on 1/12/21. The first two-year accounting is overdue. [LRSF 14.34 A.] The proposed order and courtesy copies of the supplement filed on 4/28/23 and proof of service of the complete Notice of Hearing must be received by the assigned examiner by 6/29/23. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The Court to determine if the petition should be taken off calendar for failure to prosecute it. PARTIES APPEARING MUST CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING USING THEIR FULL NAME. PLEASE HAVE YOUR CASE NUMBER AND NAME READY FOR THE CLERK. Due to COVID-19, counsel and parties should appear remotely through Zoom or CourtCall whenever possible. Please review LRSF 14.1 D. for information on remote appearances. For Zoom appearance: Meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above.
